headline: Operations Manager at Walmart
snippet: Managing warehouse operations, logistics scheduling, and team of 45 across 3 shifts.
note: operations as warehouse/logistics, not revenue operations

headline: Strategy Consultant at McKinsey
snippet: Corporate strategy engagements across retail and financial services. Growth strategy and M&A.

headline: Management Trainee at HSBC
snippet: Rotation program across retail banking, risk management, and client services.
note: management as job level, not account management skill

headline: Growth Partner at Sequoia
snippet: Working with portfolio companies on growth and go-to-market strategy.

headline: Product Manager at Slack
snippet: Managing roadmap, stakeholder alignment, and customer research for enterprise features.
note: PM — enterprise features is not enterprise sales

headline: Relationship Manager at JPMorgan
snippet: Managing HNW client relationships and portfolio advisory services.
note: relationship management → stakeholder management alias fires correctly — but is it a true positive in banking context?

headline: Business Development Manager at Oracle
snippet: New logo acquisition, outbound prospecting, and strategic partnership development.
note: BDM with outbound keyword but no enterprise/account management terms

headline: Success Coach at Peloton
snippet: Helping members achieve fitness goals, retention programs, and community building.
note: success as fitness coaching, not customer success

headline: Pipeline Engineer at Shell
snippet: Designing and maintaining oil and gas pipeline infrastructure across West Africa.
note: pipeline as oil/gas infrastructure, not sales pipeline

headline: Client Relationship Director at Deloitte
snippet: Managing client relationships across 8 advisory engagements. $5M book of business.
note: consulting client management — relationship management alias triggers

headline: Forecast Analyst at AccuWeather
snippet: Weather forecasting models and prediction accuracy. Machine learning for climate data.
note: forecast/forecasting as weather, not sales forecasting — FP via concept forms

headline: Chief of Staff — CEO Office
snippet: Strategic planning, cross-functional alignment, and operational excellence.
note: C-suite ops — no sales function keywords

headline: Community Manager at Discord
snippet: Building and engaging community, managing events, and gathering user feedback.

headline: Key Account Director at Pfizer
snippet: Managing key accounts across hospital systems. Contract negotiation and formulary access.
note: key account management alias → stakeholder management — pharma context

headline: Challenger Sales Trainer
snippet: Training sales teams on the Challenger methodology. Building enablement content and certification programs.
